section.div: 🐺 Werewolves Assistant API provides over HTTP requests a way of manage Werewolves games to help the game master.
🐺 Werewolves Assistant Web is a Nuxt Web App using the Werewolves Assistant API. It helps you, the game master, to manage your games of Werewolves Of Millers Hollow.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
